creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, I found the master site in the original PR is not valid anymore,
and the currently download link from the new official site is unfetchable:
http://kdesvn.alwins-world.de/downloads/kdesvn-0.14.2.tar.bz2
(Yes, I also noticed the official site changed, and modified the pkg-descr file)
So this patch might be delayed for a while, waiting for the master
site is fixed.
Thanks for your patience!

On Fri, Mar 7, 2008 at 5:44 AM,  <lwhsu@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: [port update] devel/kdesvn: 0.14.1 -> 0.14.2
>
>  Responsible-Changed-From-To: yuanjue->lwhsu
>  Responsible-Changed-By: lwhsu
>  Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Mar 7 13:44:14 UTC 2008
>  Responsible-Changed-Why:
>  I'll take it, actually yuanjue has only email redirection.
>
>  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=121119
>



-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
